positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_sucks_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    sucks(vacuum)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    sucks(plunger)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    sucks(vampire)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~sucks(space)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define vacuum(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
